reviews_5s: I bought these for vitamins and they are great for small capsules. They are so pretty too.Good seal, clear glass, arrived unbrokenA little smaller than I thought but perfect for spice cabinetMy husband and I have been collecting seashells from our vacations and these have been the perfect size. We take a white paint pen and write the date and location on them and plan on giving them to our toddler when she’s a bit older. It’s not a super thick glass but we prefer the thinness for what we’re using them for.Great for craftingLooked just like the picture, just as described. Shipped with care and extra padding for glassIt came perfectly intact without any cracks or damages. The size was perfect for my paper stars that I folded as a gift to my friends.Bought these to hold my vitamins instead of having ugly jars all over.Perfect for storing seashells!I was looking for a glass bottle to fill with those tiny origami stars and this was just right. Most other craft glass bottles were much too tiny to even fit one star. Comes in a pack of 3, and though I only needed one, it will be great to have a couple on hand for other projects. Well packaged in bubble wrap and taped securely!
reviews_1s: I bought two sets (ea three count bottles) got my labels on, and over the last couple of weeks have been filling them. I noticed one was leaking which I thought was weird. When I picked up the bottle and went to wipe off the bottom to see why and where it was leaking from the center bottom of the bottle shattered. Tripped me out for a second because they are glass but when I found the piece that broke I realize it's paper thin on the bottom. I cannot return five bottles that have already been labeled and filled in order to get one replaced and have no clue how to contact the seller to see if they're willing to send me 1 replacement bottle. If I could have given zero stars for sturdiness durability and quality I would have but it didn't give me that option I could only go as low as 1 starI put milk of magnesia in these, with the corks closed. When you shake them with the cork tightly pressed down, the milk of magnesia still seeps out from around the edges. Not sure how that’s possible. But take that as you will.The picture in the product shown the item seems bigger compared to the persons hand.I received all three bottles, but two were broken! Returned it. Lacking quality control!Picture is deceiving. Should have paid closer attention to Milliliters. Probably have to return them.returned itemIt’s cute. But the lid is way too small and now it’s stuck. 🙄 the kid doesn’t even look close to what it looks like in the picture
